prompt: Integrate steampunk elements, adding gears and cogs around the map for an industrial fantasy style.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Integrate steampunk elements into the scene by adding a prominent arrangement of brass and copper gears, cogs, and intricate clockwork mechanisms. These elements should surround the central world map, forming an elaborate, industrial-fantasy-style framework that appears to power or enclose the infographic.
objects: Intricate clockwork mechanisms surrounding the map
Elaborate, industrial-fantasy-style framework surrounding the map
Continent/country labels (e.g., Alaska, Canada, Europe, Russia, United States, South America, Africa, Asia, Australia)
Dotted lines connecting labels to map regions
